author: Holtrr
title: Bass boost and virtualizer.
content:
Can you please increase the bass option and add the wider sound option virtualizer. Thank you

The equaliser needs clear improvements, please can you make it more clear and full bass. Thank you 🙏

author: Applespike_Willy Wonka
title: It's okay.
content:
It's an okay app, but can you make it so that when you turn your phone off (without exiting the app), in the app when your swipe the video down to pick another video, or when the video screen is on and you swipe out of the app, make it so that the video continues playing (if that makes sense). Like how your other app; Evermusic continues playing in the background whether your turn your phone off or swipe down the music file down or go out the app. Could you try to make it like that app. 
I'm always having to manually play videos either by the control centre or the lockscreen.
